name: HOA Coordination
description: Operations coordinates HOA-governed property notices, dues, violations, approvals, and resident or owner packets with human approval before any HOA, owner, resident, legal, money, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize HOA Case
stages.description: Normalize the HOA-governed property, notice, dues, approval, or violation facts.

steps.title: Normalize HOA case
steps.instructions: Normalize property, HOA name if known, owner, resident, unit, notice type, due date, amount, violation category, approval request, governing-doc refs, photos, prior communications, and missing facts. Unknown dues, legal obligations, deadlines, or authority must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize HOA notice, dues, approval, or violation facts. No HOA, resident, owner, legal, money, or system action.

steps.title: Check HOA ownership and history
steps.instructions: Check whether a human, owner, attorney, vendor, or HOA contact already owns the item; review prior notices, dues, approvals, and cure history. If already owned, surface status and do not stage duplicate action.
steps.dispatch_body: Check HOA case ownership and history before any action. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Draft HOA Packet
stages.description: Prepare draft-only HOA, owner, resident, or vendor packets.

steps.title: Draft HOA action packet
steps.instructions: Draft packet with notice summary, dues or fine caveats, violation evidence, owner/resident/vendor draft messages, approval request checklist, cure options, and legal-review flags. Draft-only; do not send, pay, dispute, approve, contact HOA, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft HOA coordination packet only. No external sends, payments, approvals, disputes, or system writes.

steps.title: Review HOA action packet
steps.instructions: Review HOA obligations, payment or fine support, owner responsibility, resident cure language, and legal sensitivity before approval is requested.
steps.human_prompt: Review HOA packet before any HOA, owner, resident, vendor, legal, money, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage HOA Action
stages.description: Human approval gates every HOA-facing or money-sensitive action.

steps.title: Approve HOA action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or route to counsel before any HOA contact, owner notice, resident notice, vendor dispatch, fine payment, dispute, approval request, legal step, ledger action, or system write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before HOA, owner, resident, vendor, legal, money, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved HOA package
steps.instructions: Stage approved HOA package, evidence refs, due dates, owner/resident/vendor drafts, approval source, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner for human release. Do not send, pay, dispute, approve, or write external systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved HOA package for human release. No external sends, payments, disputes, approvals, or system writes.
